channel.title: Availability on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Availability on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Repository switcher generally available in global navigation
item.description:
GitHub’s repository switcher in global navigation is now generally available. It lets you jump between repositories without leaving the current page.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot individual plan sign-ups are reopening
item.description:
GitHub is gradually reopening sign-ups for Copilot Individual plans, including Student, Pro, Pro+, and Max, for new subscribers over the next couple of weeks.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Models is no longer available to new customers
item.description:
GitHub is retiring GitHub Models. As an initial step, new customers can no longer use it, while existing organizations or enterprises that have already used it are not affected by this announcement.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Per-partition automatic failover for Azure Cosmos DB
item.description:
Per-partition automatic failover (PPAF) is now generally available in Azure Cosmos DB. It allows failover at the partition level instead of failing over an entire account during a regional disruption, improving recovery time and availability.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Expanded technical preview availability for the GitHub Copilot app
item.description:
GitHub has expanded the technical preview of the Copilot app to all existing Copilot Pro, Pro+, Business, and Enterprise customers. The app is available for download on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Claude Opus 4.8 is generally available for GitHub Copilot
item.description:
Claude Opus 4.8 is now generally available in GitHub Copilot. GitHub says early testing showed improved code understanding and generation compared with earlier models.

  • Source: GitHub
